prose:
**Benzene HOMO–LUMO gap** computed by DFT frontier-orbitals calculation using **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed input from benzene.xyz (single-point, not relaxed). Exact two-electron integrals (no density fitting). SCF converged in 8 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap). HOMO = −7.0468329 eV, LUMO = −0.41574728 eV. All integrity checks passed. See above for frontier orbital table and derived chemical hardness/softness indices.</prose>
